title: Epic: Polish & Error Handling
description: Phase 5: Final polish with token refresh handling, upload debouncing, loading skeleton, and unit tests.

title: Add token refresh handling
description: Implement automatic token refresh before expiry in GoogleDriveContext
design: File: contexts/GoogleDriveContext.tsx - Add tokenExpiresAt state. Set expiry time on token response (Date.now + expires_in*1000). Add useEffect to schedule silent refresh 5 minutes before expiry using tokenClient.requestAccessToken with empty prompt.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] tokenExpiresAt state added to GoogleDriveContext
- [ ] Expiry calculated as Date.now() + expires_in * 1000
- [ ] useEffect schedules refresh at (expiry - 5min)
- [ ] tokenClient.requestAccessToken({prompt: ''}) called for silent refresh
- [ ] setTimeout cleared on component unmount
- [ ] No visible popup on token refresh

title: Add debounce to sync uploads
description: Debounce rapid uploads to prevent API flooding
design: File: hooks/useGoogleDriveSync.ts - Add debounce utility function. Create debouncedProcessQueue with 500ms delay using useMemo. Use debounced version in queueUpload to batch rapid additions.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Debounce utility implemented
- [ ] processQueue debounced with 500ms delay
- [ ] Rapid image additions batched
- [ ] No API flooding on bulk add
close_reason: Already implemented in useGoogleDriveSync.ts with 500ms debounce

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Component renders 6 skeleton items
- [ ] Grid matches gallery layout
- [ ] Smooth animation effect
- [ ] Used in GalleryModal during load

title: Manual QA testing for refinement feature
description:
Comprehensive manual testing of refinement feature across all scenarios.

Test Scenarios:
1. Generation Flow:
   - Generate lookbook image
   - Verify refinement input appears below image
   - Verify input is enabled

2. Refinement Flow:
   - Type refinement prompt
   - Press Enter to submit
   - Verify loading state (spinner on button)
   - Verify refined image updates
   - Verify history shows new entry
   - Expand history, verify timestamp format
   - Repeat refinement 2-3 times

3. Reset Flow:
   - Click reset button
   - Verify session clears
   - Verify history clears
   - Generate new image to test again

4. Error States:
   - Try refining without image → verify error
   - Simulate API error → verify error message
   - Try refining empty prompt → verify button disabled

5. Language Testing:
   - Test all strings in English
   - Switch to Vietnamese
   - Test all strings in Vietnamese
   - Verify time ago format in both languages

6. Edge Cases:
   - Tab change during refinement
   - Multiple rapid refinements
   - Very long refinement prompts
   - Special characters in prompts

Success Criteria:
- All test scenarios pass
- No console errors
- UI responsive and intuitive
- Both languages work correctly
- Feature ready for production

title: Epic: Batch Watermark Remover - Xóa watermark hàng loạt

title: Tạo hooks/useWatermarkRemover.ts

- Parallel processing với configurable concurrency
- Per-item progress tracking (0-100%)
- Continue on error (không dừng batch khi 1 ảnh fail)

acceptance_criteria:

title: Create RefinementInput component
description:
Create shared UI component for image refinement input.

Component Interface:
- onRefine: (prompt: string) => void
- onReset: () => void
- history: RefinementHistoryItem[]
- isRefining: boolean
- disabled: boolean

Features:
- Text input for refinement prompt
- Enter key submits (Shift+Enter for newline)
- Refine button with loading spinner
- Reset button (visible when history > 0)
- Collapsible refinement history
- Time ago formatting (1m ago, 2h ago)
- Tooltip explaining feature

UI Design:
- Match existing zinc/amber theme
- Responsive layout
- Disabled state when no image
- Loading spinner during refinement

Files:
- Create: components/shared/RefinementInput.tsx

Success Criteria:
- Input accepts text and submits on Enter
- Refine button shows loading state
- History displays with timestamps
- History is collapsible
- Reset button appears after first refinement
- Component disabled when disabled=true

title: Create image chat service module
description:
Create services/gemini/chat.ts with ImageChatSession interface for multi-turn image refinement.

Implementation:
- Create createImageChatSession() factory function
- Implement sendRefinement() method using Gemini Chat API
- Track refinement history in session
- Implement reset() to clear session
- Export from imageEditingService.ts

Technical Details:
- Use ai.chats.create() with responseModalities: [Modality.IMAGE]
- Send current image + text prompt as Parts in each message
- Extract refined image from response.candidates[0].content.parts
- Store history as {prompt, timestamp} array

Files:
- Create: services/gemini/chat.ts
- Modify: services/imageEditingService.ts

Success Criteria:
- Chat session can be created
- Refinement returns new image
- History tracks all refinements
- Reset clears session and history
- Errors use i18n keys

title: Create Sync Hook useGoogleDriveSync
description: Create React hook for managing sync between local gallery and Google Drive
design: File: hooks/useGoogleDriveSync.ts - State: syncStatus (idle/syncing/synced/error), lastSynced, syncError, folderId, isInitialLoadComplete. Refs: syncQueue (pending ops), imageToFileId mapping. Functions: loadFromDrive, queueUpload, queueDelete, processQueue (with retry logic), forceSync. Queue supports upload/delete operations with MAX_RETRIES=3.

- [ ] queueUpload adds to queue and processes
- [ ] queueDelete removes from Drive
- [ ] Retry logic works (3 retries with 2s delay)
- [ ] imageToFileId mapping maintained
close_reason: useGoogleDriveSync hook implemented with SyncStatus, loadFromDrive, queueUpload/Delete, processQueue with retry (MAX_RETRIES=3), forceSync. Fixed race condition (try-finally), removed YAGNI duplicate check.

On addImage: queue upload if connected. On deleteImage: queue delete if connected. On clearImages: queue delete all.

title: Epic: Lookbook AI - Iterative Image Refinement
description:
Add prompt input below generated lookbook image for iterative refinement using Gemini multi-turn chat context. Users can refine results iteratively instead of regenerating from scratch.

Acceptance Criteria:
- User can input refinement prompts after image generation
- Refinements maintain context of previous edits
- History shows past refinements with collapsible UI
- Reset button clears session and returns to original
- Loading state during refinement
- Error handling for failed refinements

Technical Approach: Leverage Gemini Chat API multi-turn capability with image output modality.

title: Add refinement state to useLookbookGenerator hook
description:
Extend useLookbookGenerator hook with refinement state and handlers.

State Additions:
- chatSession: ImageChatSession | null
- refinementHistory: RefinementHistoryItem[]
- isRefining: boolean

Handler Additions:
- handleRefineImage(prompt: string)
- handleResetRefinement()

Implementation Details:
- Import chat service types
- Create chat session after successful generation in handleGenerate()
- Implement handleRefineImage to call chatSession.sendRefinement()
- Update generatedLookbook.main with refined image
- Clear variations/closeups after refinement
- Update refinementHistory from session.getHistory()
- Implement handleResetRefinement to reset session
- Export new state and handlers

Edge Cases:
- Refine without image → show error
- Refine during loading → button disabled
- Reset without session → no-op
- Tab change during refine → allow (async continues)

Files:
- Modify: hooks/useLookbookGenerator.ts

Success Criteria:
- Chat session created after generation
- Refinement updates main image
- History tracked correctly
- Reset clears session
- Loading state works
- Errors display properly

title: Epic: Phase 1 - Critical Performance Fixes
description: Week 1 critical fixes enabling 40% load reduction, 70% lag reduction, 60KB bundle savings. Foundation for Phase 2 refactoring. All 3 tasks run in parallel (zero file conflicts).

title: ImageUploader memoization - eliminate 1000+ re-renders
description: Wrap ImageUploader with React.memo, add useMemo for preview calculation, useCallback for all handlers. Fixes ISSUE 1 from performance report. File: components/ImageUploader.tsx (150 lines). Parallel with 1b, 1c.
design:
1. Wrap component: React.memo<ImageUploaderProps>
2. Preview: useMemo(() => image ? data:;base64, : null, [image?.base64, image?.mimeType])
3. processFile: useCallback(async (file: File) => {...}, [onImageUpload])
4. Drag handlers: useCallback for handleDragEnter, handleDragOver, handleDrop, handleDragLeave
5. No custom comparator needed - shallow prop comparison sufficient
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Component wrapped with React.memo
- [ ] Preview calculation memoized with correct deps
- [ ] All callbacks use useCallback with correct deps
- [ ] No prop drilling anti-patterns
- [ ] All 14 features functional
- [ ] No console warnings
- [ ] Performance: 1000+ re-renders eliminated per session
close_reason: Phase 1 completed: React memoization, debounce, lazy keys - all tests passing, 0 critical issues

title: LocalStorage debounce + lodash-es migration - fix 200ms typing lag
description: Replace lodash with lodash-es (tree-shakeable), add 1000ms debounce to localStorage writes. Fixes ISSUE 6 + bundle optimization. Files: hooks/useLookbookGenerator.ts, package.json. Parallel with 1a, 1c.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] lodash → lodash-es in package.json
- [ ] Tree-shakeable import syntax used
- [ ] 1000ms debounce implemented
- [ ] Cleanup in useEffect return
- [ ] No typing lag in forms
- [ ] Draft restoration works
- [ ] Bundle -60KB verified (npm run build:analyze)
- [ ] localStorage updates 1s after typing stops
close_reason: Phase 1 completed: React memoization, debounce, lazy keys - all tests passing, 0 critical issues

title: Add key props to 14 lazy components - fix React reconciliation
description: Add key prop to all lazy-loaded feature components in renderActiveFeature switch. Fixes ISSUE 5 from performance report. File: App.tsx (lines 96-129). Parallel with 1a, 1b.
design:
Add key prop to each case in renderActiveFeature():
- case Feature.TryOn: return <VirtualTryOn key="try-on" />
- case Feature.Lookbook: return <LookbookGenerator key="lookbook" />
- case Feature.Background: return <BackgroundReplacer key="background" />
- case Feature.Pose: return <PoseChanger key="pose" onOpenPoseLibrary={...} />
- case Feature.SwapFace: return <SwapFace key="swap-face" />
- case Feature.PhotoAlbum: return <PhotoAlbumCreator key="photo-album" />
- case Feature.OutfitAnalysis: return <OutfitAnalysis key="outfit-analysis" />
- case Feature.Relight: return <Relight key="relight" />
- case Feature.Upscale: return <Upscale key="upscale" />
- case Feature.Video: return <VideoGenerator key="video" />
- case Feature.VideoContinuity: return <VideoContinuity key="video-continuity" />
- case Feature.GRWMVideo: return <GRWMVideoGenerator key="grwm-video" />
- case Feature.Inpainting: return <Inpainting key="inpainting" />
- case Feature.ImageEditor: return null (modal, no key needed)
- default: return <VirtualTryOn key="try-on" />
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] All 14 components have key props
- [ ] Keys match Feature enum values
- [ ] PoseChanger retains onOpenPoseLibrary prop
- [ ] ImageEditor case returns null (unchanged)
- [ ] Default case has key
- [ ] No console warnings
- [ ] Feature switching works
- [ ] Component state resets on switch
close_reason: Phase 1 completed: React memoization, debounce, lazy keys - all tests passing, 0 critical issues

title: Epic: Phase 2 - Major Refactoring

title: Split LookbookGenerator - 954 lines → 4 files, -12-20ms/interaction
description: Extract form UI (LookbookForm.tsx), output display (LookbookOutput.tsx), prompt logic (utils/lookbookPromptBuilder.ts). Main file becomes orchestrator (~150 lines). Fixes ISSUE 2. Parallel with 2b, 2c. Blocked by Phase 1.
design:
New structure:
1. components/LookbookForm.tsx (~300 lines, memoized)
   - All form inputs (clothing, style, aspect ratio, etc.)
   - Props: formState, onFormChange, onGenerateDescription, isGeneratingDescription
   - React.memo with useCallback handlers
2. components/LookbookOutput.tsx (~200 lines, memoized)
   - Tabs: main, variations, closeup
   - Props: lookbook, activeTab, onTabChange, onUpscale, upscalingStates
   - React.memo
3. utils/lookbookPromptBuilder.ts (~350 lines, pure function)
   - export const buildLookbookPrompt = (formState) => string
   - All prompt construction logic from lines 144-262
   - No side effects
4. components/LookbookGenerator.tsx (orchestrator, ~150 lines)
   - Import hook: useLookbookGenerator()
   - Render: <LookbookForm /> + <LookbookOutput />
   - All callbacks use useCallback
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] LookbookGenerator split into 4 files
- [ ] LookbookForm fully memoized
- [ ] LookbookOutput fully memoized
- [ ] buildLookbookPrompt is pure function
- [ ] All features functional (form, generation, variations, closeups)
- [ ] Performance improved 12-20ms/interaction
- [ ] Code coverage maintained
- [ ] No prop drilling anti-patterns
close_reason: Phase 02a Split LookbookGenerator completed. 4 files created, build passing, code review approved 10/10.
